advert.description: The brand name "SunLife" and its logo appear prominently in the top left corner and on the yellow banner with contact details.
The "HSL" logo is visible centrally alongside the text "Spend & Save" and "Save up to £600" in the final end card.
The "Yeo Valley Organic" logo is visible on the product packaging (yogurt, milk) and the exterior sign at the beginning of the ad.
